visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a man in a white T-shirt featuring a masked figure graphic, sitting in a studio-like setting with a shelf of cat figurines. He gestures with a purple foam tube while speaking expressively. (2) A title card appears on a paper-textured background with text regarding house money management. (3) A close-up shows a person wearing a grotesque, wide-mouthed mask and a red hoodie, reacting dramatically. (4) The host in the white T-shirt hits the masked person with the purple tube in a comedic manner, with large red text overlays appearing on screen. (5) Another individual in a yellow mask with an exaggerated face speaks while gesturing broadly. (6) The scene shifts back to the host, who is laughing and shouting, surrounded by other people in the background. (7) A woman with long dark hair in a black hoodie is shown speaking seriously but with a hint of humor. (8) Confetti falls as a man in a tan shirt is jokingly hit, and several people cheer in the background. (9) The host returns to the frame, making exaggerated facial expressions and pointing at the camera. (10) The video ends with a montage of laughter and the host waving the foam tube alongside the masked characters.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天要辯論的主題就是啊. [Logo]: @yga. (2) [Variety]: 本集辯題. 家裡的錢要女人管？還是男人管？. (3) [Subtitle]: 你拿我們大筆的那個資金. 理財資金. 它現在怎麼樣. (4) [Variety]: 跌慘啊. 落水啊. 變水餃股. 整個. 再砍半. 再半半. (5) [Subtitle]: 這是由研究的. 在金融市場裡面. 通常. 女生一定會比男生賺的更多. 因為投資最重要是什麼. (6) [Variety]: 耐心. 80年？ 90年？ 100年？ (7) [Subtitle]: 川普就是黑天鵝. (8) [Logo]: NO SIGNAL. (9) [Subtitle]: 我就問一句就好了. (10) [Variety]: 財產. 經濟大權. 給女生管真的比較好嗎？ (11) [Subtitle]: 你問看看 Andy老師 好不好. (12) [Variety]: Andy老師 好不好. 哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦. (13) [Subtitle]: 現在有25%. 結婚之後搞不好. 反正都結婚都共有了啊. 你連1%都用不了啊. (14) [Variety]: 剩懶趴. (15) [Subtitle]: 從李家嫁去蔡家. 人也要拿. 錢也要拿. 像球員你轉隊. 我從我們這一隊. 轉去你那那一隊. 會給點補償金嘛. 才付個餅錢. 就在那邊說嘴. (16) [Variety]: 16萬. 16萬講那麼久. 我還你61萬. (17) [Variety]: 好. 好. 好.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 primary host, 1 female lead speaker, 1 male support speaker (Andy), and 3 masked or background figures.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main host wears a white T-shirt with a parody graphic and light blue patchwork jeans. A female speaker wears a plain black hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio set designed like a living room with brick walls, decorative cat toys, and frames.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice introduces the debate topic with a rapid speech rate and high volume. Light, upbeat electronic BGM plays in the background. (2) A musical jingle signals a scene transition. (3) A mid-pitched male voice speaks with exaggerated rhythm while BGM continues. (4) Frequent sharp 'thwack' and 'pop' sound effects occur as host hits characters, accompanied by loud group laughter and cheering. (5) A different male voice delivers a comedic argument with clear articulation and high pitch variability. (6) Sudden burst of white noise static occurs at the 'No Signal' visual. (7) Loud cheering and the sound of rustling paper (confetti) dominate the mix as the host continues to shout and laugh. (8) A female voice enters the conversation with a firm but playful tone, supported by background chuckles. (9) The audio concludes with a crescendo of collective laughter, rhythmic clapping, and a final comedic musical stinger.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Chaotic Debate -> Reaction Shots -> Climax/Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic variety-show style debate video focusing on domestic financial control between partners, using exaggerated characters, physical comedy, and fast-paced editing to entertain the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's high social-media production value and interactive nature suggest it is a clip from a larger YouTube entertainment program.
